info.name: Web of Science Starter Search Documents

params.name: q
params.description: Advanced query syntax string. Supports field tags such as TS (topic), AU (author), SO (source), DO (DOI), and others.

params.name: db
params.description: Database to search. Options include WOS, BIOABS, MEDLINE, etc. Defaults to WOS (Web of Science Core Collection).

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of records to return per page (1-50).

params.name: publishTimeSpan
params.description: Time span for publication date filter in format YYYY-MM-DD+YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: modifiedTimeSpan
params.description: Time span for last modified date filter in format YYYY-MM-DD+YYYY-MM-DD.

items.docs: Search Web of Science documents using the advanced query syntax. Returns bibliographic metadata including titles, authors, sources, DOIs, and times-cited counts. Supports pagination, sorting, and filtering by database and time span.

info.name: Web of Science Starter Get Document by UID

params.name: uid
params.description: Web of Science unique identifier (e.g., WOS:000000000000001).

items.docs: Retrieve a specific Web of Science document by its unique identifier (UID). Returns full bibliographic metadata including title, authors, source, abstract, keywords, DOI, and times-cited count.

info.name: Web of Science Starter Search Journals by ISSN

params.name: issn
params.description: ISSN (print or electronic) of the journal to retrieve.

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text query to search journals by name or related terms.

items.docs: Search and retrieve journal information from the Web of Science Journal Citation Reports. Query journals by ISSN to get metadata including impact factor, category, and JCR profile URL.

info.name: Web of Science Starter Get Journal by ID

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific journal using its Web of Science journal identifier. Returns journal title, ISSN, publisher, categories, impact metrics, and JCR profile URL.
